name: Brown Sugar Shortbread Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Lightly butter a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Using an electric mixer, beat the butter in a large bowl until light and fluffy.
4. Add the brown sugar and beat well.
5. Using a rubber spatula, mix in the flour and salt (do not overmix).
6. Press the dough into the prepared pan.
7. In a small bowl, combine the granulated sugar and cinnamon.
8. Sprinkle the cinnamon-sugar mixture evenly over the dough.
9. Cut the dough into 12 wedges using a ruler as a guide, cutting through the dough completely.
10. Pierce each wedge several times with a toothpick.
11. Bake until the shortbread is browned and firm at the edges but slightly soft in the center, about 1 hour.
12. Allow the shortbread to cool completely in the pan on a rack.
13. Remove the pan sides.
14. Recut the cookies into wedges.
